attempts.insight: Probe-confirmed Ext-against-constantSheaf body adopted verbatim with only an optional cosmetic prefix drop. lean_diagnostic_messages clean (errors=0 warnings=0); lean_verify on AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.HModule reports kernel-only axioms [propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound]. The `noncomputable abbrev` form (vs `def`) is mandatory for instance-transparent wrappers around Ext: under `def`, AddCommMonoid synthesis fails on the wrapper; under `abbrev`, the wrapper is reducible and Module k / AddCommGroup synthesis succeeds through Abelian.Ext.instModule. Closure extends the iter-006/007/008 streak of 100% first-edit probe-confirmed closures to a fourth consecutive round.
